step_by_step_thinking:
Clinical Reasoning:
Given the severity of the pain and the short duration (not relieved for 1 hour), there is strong suspicion of testicular torsion. Early diagnostic workup including manual detorsion and urgent surgical exploration are crucial to preserve testicular function. Given the highly time-sensitive nature of testicular torsion, exploring the affected side promptly and operating on the opposite side prophylactically is recommended.
Answer: \boxed{C} Based on the evidence emphasizing the time-critical nature of testicular torsion, where early intervention maximizes testicular salvability, the correct approach involves immediate surgical exploration of the affected side and prophylactic fixation of the opposite side, regardless of current symptomatology. Hence,
